offer: For property managers handling 10-20 rental units/month, inconsistent reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate rent roll reporting instead of manual spreadsheet calculations.
problem: Inconsistent and delayed rent roll reports lead to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for property management
try_it: Let users try customizable report templates and dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
